name: HDFC Bank Infinia Metal Edition Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Insurance spends earn rewards but remain subject to HDFC product caps
Gold and jewellery purchases earn rewards subject to current HDFC terms
Education payments can earn rewards subject to current HDFC terms

joiningBenefits: 12,500 Reward Points upon joining fee realization and card activation
Complimentary Club Marriott membership for the first year, offering up to 25% discount on dining & stays across Asia-Pacific
renewalBenefits: 12,500 Reward Points as renewal benefit after fee realization
additionalBenefits: Unlimited complimentary airport lounge access worldwide via Priority Pass (for both primary and add-on cardholders)
Unlimited complimentary Golf lessons and games at leading courses in India and select courses worldwide
100% green fee waiver at select golf courses worldwide
ITC Hotels: Book a stay for 3 nights and pay for 2 at participating hotels
ITC Hotels: 1+1 complimentary buffet at participating hotels
24x7 global personal concierge assistance
1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India on transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 1,00,000
Luxury metal card design with premium lifestyle positioning
additionalDetails: Earning is capped at a maximum of 2,00,000 Reward Points per statement cycle.
Reward points on grocery spends are capped at 2,000 per calendar month, and on insurance spends at 10,000 per calendar month.
Redemption is allowed a maximum of 5 times per calendar month.
Redemption against statement balance (cashback) is capped at 50,000 points per calendar month.
Redemption for travel bookings (flights/hotels) and Air Miles is capped at 1,50,000 Reward Points per calendar month.

Redemption for Apple products and Tanishq vouchers via SmartBuy is at 1 RP = Rs 1, capped at 70% of bill value, with further caps of 1 Apple product per calendar quarter and 50,000 points per calendar month for Tanishq vouchers.
Accidental Air Death Cover worth Rs 3 Crore, Overseas Emergency Hospitalization up to Rs 50 Lakhs, and Credit Shield Cover up to Rs 9 Lakhs.
internalNotes: For INFINIA Cards sourced before October 18, 2021: Joining/Renewal Fee is Rs 10,000 + taxes, with waiver at Rs 8 lakh annual spend.
